title: wholesome salty Brazilian bhuna Toast
description: A low-fodmap, creamy, and savory Brazilian-inspired dish perfect for a solo dinner. This recipe uses stale bread for added texture.
instructions: Slice the bread into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the melted butter over the bread and toss to coat.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 10 minutes or until lightly toasted.
While the bread is baking, cook the chorizo in a skillet over medium heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the toasted bread, cooked chorizo mixture, and shredded cheddar cheese.
Stir in the chopped parsley and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the top and toss to combine.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
